name: @coastalgit/solution-os
description: SolutionOS CLI for installing and auditing AI-operable workspace memory.

scripts.test: node --check ./bin/sos.js && node ./scripts/check-public-language.mjs && node ./bin/sos.js audit --target . && node ./bin/sos.js audit --target ./templates/core && node --test ./tests/sos-cli.test.js
